summary: Created Cross-Thread Resolution Handler that enables V to resolve pending decisions from any thread via SMS, with automatic routing back to originating context (va or zoputer).

features.short_id_support: Accepts 4-8 character short IDs, not just full UUIDs
features.context_display: Shows question, background, options with letters, recommendation with confidence
features.origin_routing: va decisions stay local; zoputer decisions routed back via zoputer_client.call_zoputer()

notes: The zoputer routing requires ZOPUTER_API_KEY environment variable to be set. For va-origin decisions, routing is instant (local). For zoputer-origin decisions, uses zoputer_client.call_zoputer() which sends a structured prompt asking zoputer to acknowledge and apply the resolution.
